name: Loretta Lynn's Coal Miner's Daughter's Gooey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake according to the directions on the package.
2. Once the cake is warm from the oven, use a fork or knife to poke holes halfway into the cake surface, spacing them about 1 inch apart.
3. Pour sweetened condensed milk into the holes you made in the cake.
4. Spread caramel topping evenly over the entire top of the cake and refrigerate until set.
5. After the cake has cooled completely, spread Cool Whip® on top and sprinkle crushed Heath candy bars over the surface.
6. Refrigerate the cake for at least 8 hours to allow it to firm up before serving.
